title: periploca ephedriformis
intro: Periploca ephedriformis is a perennial climber plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa and Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is known to help manage fever, reduce pain and swelling, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Periploca ephedriformis is often prepared as a decoction or infused in tea, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
